pi_items.source: Verified against verifier.py (DASHBOARD_NAME) and setup_task.sh deletion query

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate synthetic StatsD UDP metrics (payment.success and payment.failure) to populate the Graphite server. The background data for the "System Impact" graph (servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization) originates from real EC2 CPU utilization data downloaded from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) realAWSCloudwatch dataset during environment setup. The exact expected dashboard name is "Payment Gateway" and the exported result data is verified from /tmp/statsd_application_telemetry_result.json.
